creator: gerard_seibert@outlook.com
text:
(In reply to tech-lists from comment #164)

Nice catch. I want to find out if others experiencing this problem are also using the same hardware.

The question should not be if I really require usb3, but assuming that is the problem, why everyone else except apparently FreeBSD can support it, and why did this problem not manifest itself until FreeBSD version => 12?
